ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vaccination_data" (
  "vax_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination record */,
  "vax_first" INTEGER /* Number of individuals who received their first dose */,
  "vax_full" INTEGER /* Number of individuals who received full vaccination */,
  "vax_booster" INTEGER /* Number of individuals who received booster shots */,
  "teryt" TEXT /* Teryt code for the region */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of vaccination */,
  "vaccine_type" TEXT /* Type of vaccine (e.g., Pfizer, Moderna) */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of vaccinated individuals */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of vaccinated individuals */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the data source */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the vaccination campaign */,
  "vaccination_center_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the vaccination center */,
  "healthcare_provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the healthcare provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vax_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_data_vaccination_center_id FOREIGN KEY ("vaccination_center_id") REFERENCES vaccination_centers ("center_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_data_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES vaccination_campaigns ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_data_date FOREIGN KEY ("date") REFERENCES dates ("date"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_data_healthcare_provider_id FOREIGN KEY ("healthcare_provider_id") REFERENCES healthcare_providers ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_data_teryt FOREIGN KEY ("teryt") REFERENCES regions ("teryt")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "teryt" TEXT /* Teryt code for the region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "coordinates" TEXT /* Geographic coordinates of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("teryt")
)

CREATE TABLE "dates" (
  "date_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each date */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of vaccination */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the date */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the date */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day of the date */,
  "week" INTEGER /* Week number of the date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_centers" (
  "center_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination center */,
  "center_name" TEXT /* Name of the vaccination center */,
  "teryt" TEXT /* Teryt code for the region */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the vaccination center */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the vaccination center */,
  "coordinates" TEXT /* Geographic coordinates of the vaccination center */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("center_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_centers_teryt FOREIGN KEY ("teryt") REFERENCES regions ("teryt")
)

CREATE TABLE "healthcare_providers" (
  "provider_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each healthcare provider */,
  "provider_name" TEXT /* Name of the healthcare provider */,
  "teryt" TEXT /* Teryt code for the region */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the healthcare provider */,
  "coordinates" TEXT /* Geographic coordinates of the healthcare provider */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("provider_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_healthcare_providers_teryt FOREIGN KEY ("teryt") REFERENCES regions ("teryt")
)

CREATE TABLE "government_agencies" (
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each government agency */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the government agency */,
  "teryt" TEXT /* Teryt code for the region */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the government agency */,
  "coordinates" TEXT /* Geographic coordinates of the government agency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_government_agencies_teryt FOREIGN KEY ("teryt") REFERENCES regions ("teryt")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "teryt" TEXT /* Teryt code for the region */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., CSV, API, database) */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Last update date of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sources_teryt FOREIGN KEY ("teryt") REFERENCES regions ("teryt")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccination_campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the vaccination campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "campaign_type" TEXT /* Type of campaign (e.g., public, private) */,
  "target_population" INTEGER /* Target population for the campaign */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_campaigns_start_date FOREIGN KEY ("start_date") REFERENCES dates ("date"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccination_campaigns_end_date FOREIGN KEY ("end_date") REFERENCES dates ("date")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
